articles.title: Korean Stocks Tumble After Reaching Milestone as Foreigners Sell - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: South Korea’s world-beating stock rally came to a sudden halt as the benchmark tumbled on Friday, underscoring the vulnerability of a market dominated by a pair of chipmakers.

articles.title: Stock futures fall after Dow retakes 50,000: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street is coming off yet another positive session, with both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite closing at record highs.

articles.title: Cerebras Just Pulled Off the Biggest IPO Of 2026 So Far. History Says This Happens Next. - The Motley Fool
articles.description: Demand for the AI chipmaker's debut was more than 20 times oversubscribed. But history offers some sobering context for what could come next.

articles.title: Gautam Adani to Settle With SEC, Nears End of US Legal Woes - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Gautam Adani is on the cusp of ending a series of legal threats in the US, paving the way for Asia’s richest man to ramp up investment and capital raising after months of battling allegations including fraud and bribery.

articles.title: LIRR service in and out of Penn Station suspended through Friday morning rush due to electrical fire - News12 | Long Island
articles.description: The subway will be cross-honoring LIRR tickets, officials say.

articles.title: The Real Losers of the Musk v. Altman Trial - WIRED
articles.description: A federal jury is now deciding whether Elon Musk will win his lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman—but the trial has made everyone look bad.

articles.title: Speech by Governor Barr on the balance sheet - Federal Reserve (.gov)
articles.description: Thank you for the opportunity to speak to you today.  1      There has been a lot of discussion of late about reducing the size of the balance sheet of the Fed

articles.title: Honda’s hybrid future starts with new Accord and RDX prototypes - The Verge
articles.description: Honda revealed prototypes of two new hybrids, an Accord sedan and the Acura RDX, as it shifts away from EVs.

articles.title: The bond market is already hiking rates as Kevin Warsh takes over as Fed’s new chair - MarketWatch
articles.description: There is a perception that new Fed chairs are tested by market turmoil

articles.title: Pentagon’s ‘Deal Team Six’ Aims to Challenge China’s Grip on Rare Earth Power - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: From an office a few blocks from the White House, a group of former Wall Streeters is at the forefront of the Pentagon’s plan to crack China’s critical-minerals stranglehold.

articles.title: As LIRR strike looms, Hochul warns Long Islanders they may have to stay home - Gothamist
articles.description: The governor pointed out the MTA's plan to run shuttle buses during a strike wouldn't come close to handling the 270,000 riders the LIRR carries every weekday.

articles.title: Nvidia Stock Extends Winning Streak On China News - Investor's Business Daily
articles.description: Nvidia stock gapped higher on Thursday on a report that Chinese firms are lining up to buy its AI chips if they can secure China's approval.

articles.title: Ford Stock Is Ripping Again. Suddenly, It’s an AI Data Center Stock. - Barron's
articles.description: Ford stock was up 9% in early trading on Thursday after a massive 13% gain on Wednesday.

articles.title: Nearly 40% chances of stagflation by end of 2026, traders say - CNBC
articles.description: Traders are not optimistic about the state of economy by the end of this year, placing high chances of stagflation, a mix of high inflation and unemployment.

articles.title: Chinese parts are already in U.S. cars as lawmakers warn Trump against China auto deal - CNBC
articles.description: Trump-Xi talks spark bipartisan warnings over Chinese automakers, U.S. auto jobs, connected vehicles and China’s growing role in the supply chain.

articles.title: Energy Department Awards $94 Million to American Companies to Help Expedite the Deployments of Small Modular Reactors in the United States - Department of Energy (.gov)
articles.description: The U.S. Department of Energy today announced the selection of eight companies to support the near-term deployment of advanced light-water small modular reactors in the United States.

articles.title: Bitcoin hits $82,000, Coinbase leads crypto stock gains as Clarity act advances - CoinDesk
articles.description: The upbeat public debut of AI chipmaker Cerebras is also helping to lift both crypto and traditional markets.

articles.description: By Lucia Mutikani WASHINGTON, May 14 (Reuters) - U.S. retail sales increased solidly for a third straight month in April, though part of the rise in receipts...

articles.title: Use this map to find the data centers in your backyard - The Verge
articles.description: A college student built a map showing the latest developments in data center policies in North America, Europe, and Asia.
